system.description: If your pouch of sand isn’t on hand, ask someone else for theirs. Whenever somebody nearby is about to open a container of any size, roll [quality].

outcomes.success: the container is also full of sleeping sand, which explodes out in an airborne cloud. Anyone who inhales this dust while it is airborne falls asleep.
outcomes.failure: you become filled with the sand instead. Your limbs become rigid, your vision blurry, your mouth dry. Even slight damage to your newly paper-thin skin will cause you to burst, releasing a pile of sand that puts anyone nearby to sleep.
outcomes.eachplus3:
secretly select something that closes and place your sealed selections in a place all players can see. Make sure your selections are written separately. Examples may include a vial, book, briefcase, jacket, guitar case, mouth, etc.

For the rest of the Mission, when something matching your selections opens, you may reveal it, discard it, and choose to replicate the effect of a success without rolling. You can only use any given selection once per Mission.
